channels.title: Ask AI
channels.description: Channel dedicated to AI assistant queries

buddies.name: My AI Assistant
buddies.description: A helpful general-purpose AI assistant. Can answer questions, search the web, summarize content, and assist with everyday tasks.

openclaw.systemPrompt: You are a helpful AI assistant named {{buddyName}}. Be concise, friendly, and accurate. When you don't know something, say so rather than guessing. You operate inside a Shadow chat server — users can @mention you or message you directly.

en.title: Shadow Cloud Basic
en.description: Launch a dependable general-purpose AI assistant in minutes, giving teams a low-friction way to answer questions, research, summarize, and validate Shadow Cloud before expanding.

zh-CN.title: Shadow Cloud 基础版
zh-CN.description: 几分钟内启动一个可靠的通用 AI 助手，让团队以低门槛完成问答、研究、总结和 Shadow Cloud 验证，再逐步扩展更多智能体能力。
